hero.headline: Get {{service}} in {{location}} with flexible finance terms
hero.subline: Fixed-install quotes from trusted engineers, plus domestic power flushing support where needed.

heroImage.alt: Smiling engineer installing a modern boiler

trust.guaranteeText: Guaranteed for up to 10 years (selected ranges include 5 or 7 years)

pricing.pricingDisclaimer: Install pricing varies by property size, flue route, controls, and boiler output.

financeExample.summary: Finance available over 3, 5, 8, and 10 years. Interest rates are discussed at quote appointment.

proofCards.reviewSnippet: Whole installation done in one day and left spotless.
Great advice on boiler size and controls.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Most standard combi swaps are completed within one working day.

faqs.question: Can I spread the cost?
faqs.answer: Yes. Finance terms are available over 3, 5, 8, and 10 years, subject to status.

seo.title: Boiler Installation in Uxbridge | Empire Home Solutions
seo.description: Fixed-price boiler installation in Uxbridge from Heating and Gas Engineers with warranties of up to 10 years.
